# Third-Party Notice: Arelle

This directory contains integration files for Arelle.

Arelle itself is distributed separately under the Apache License 2.0. EEL
Accounts does not vendor Arelle source or binaries into this repository. The
installer can create a local, git-ignored runtime under `runtime/`.

Upstream project:

```text
https://github.com/Arelle/Arelle
```

Documentation:

```text
https://arelle.readthedocs.io/
```

Licence:
